vocab.example: I'm quite keen on street photography as it allows me to document the raw and unscripted moments of urban life.

vocab.meaning: những bức ảnh toàn cảnh đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: Whenever I go hiking, I make sure to capture some breathtaking panoramas of the mountain ranges.
I have a soft spot for photographing architectural marvels, especially those that blend historical styles with modern glasswork.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (khoảng thời gian ngay sau khi mặt trời mọc hoặc trước khi mặt trời lặn)
vocab.example: I always try to take my portraits during the golden hour to take advantage of the warm, soft natural lighting.

vocab.meaning: ảnh đơn sắc (thường là đen trắng)
vocab.example: I occasionally produce monochrome images to emphasize the contrast and emotional depth of the subject matter.

vocab.meaning: ảnh chụp khoảnh khắc đang hành động/chuyển động
vocab.example: Being a sports enthusiast, I enjoy taking high-speed action shots that freeze a split-second of intense competition.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I don't just take random photos; I always look for a unique composition that has a strong aesthetic appeal.
During my downtime, I experiment with stilled life photography, arranging everyday objects to create a compelling visual story.
I prefer using a professional DSLR camera because it produces high-resolution images that retain incredible detail.

vocab.meaning: căn chỉnh bố cục khung hình
vocab.example: I like to use natural elements like overhanging branches to frame a shot, adding a sense of depth to my landscape photos.
